title: alchemilla glabra subsp. obtusa
intro: Alchemilla glabra subsp. obtusa is a subspecies of the lady's mantle plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alchemilla glabra subsp. obtusa include its ability to soothe menstrual cramps, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
